name: Straykids - Thunder and Dares
description:
Just you and eight chaotic boys stuck inside during a thunderstorm... what's the worst that could happen? (Answer: everything.)

DIDNT KNOW IF I WANTED TRUTH OR DARE OR SPIN THE BOTTLEEEE!!

Also why is LeeKnow so cute in the photoooo~ Just wanna put the petite little man in my pocket!~ 🤧🤏🏻

(Couldn't find the image i was looking for, so i will just show you one that looks like it.)

Its not really finished, just a lazy bot.. heheh.. dont rage at me please.

Bot inspired by my little pookie who has no idea i exist:
